name: Integration - End-to-End Query Flow
description: Tests the full workflow from receiving a query to returning an answer, including chunk retrieval and LLM response.
input: POST /query with JSON body: {"user_query": "What is the maximum allowed reimbursement for meals?"}
output: JSON response with success=true, answer containing relevant policy section, error=null, tips=null
success_criteria: response.json()['answer'] contains 'reimbursement' or relevant policy text
error_scenarios: Azure AI Search or OpenAI API returns error
